config.script:
def setMessage(status, message):
	    system.perspective.sendMessage(
	        messageType="setMessage",
	        payload={"message": message, "status": status},
	        scope="view"
	    )
	try:
		print("Inside try--->")
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.data='' 
		from java.util import Date
		from java.text import SimpleDateFormat
		areaName=self.getSibling("DDArea").props.value
		lineName=self.getSibling("DDLine").props.value
		if areaName=="" or lineName=="":
		  message='Please select Both Area and Line'
		  setMessage("Error",message)
		else:
			namedQuery='Project_VECV/Report/StationStatusReport/getStationOkNokDetails'
			namedQuery2='Project_VECV/Report/StationStatusReport/getStationOkNokDetails_DH'
			startDate=self.getSibling("InpFromDate").props.value
			endDate=self.getSibling("InpToDate").props.value
			system.perspective.print("startDate 1 %s"%startDate)
			if (startDate is None or startDate =='') or (endDate is None or endDate==''):
				message='From date and To date cannot be Empty'
				setMessage("Error",message)
			else:    
				diffMillis = endDate.getTime() - startDate.getTime()
				diffDays = diffMillis / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
				system.perspective.print("diffDays %s"%diffDays)
				if diffDays<0:
					message='End date cannot be greater than Start Date'    
					setMessage("Error",message)
					system.perspective.print("message %s"%message)
				elif diffDays>30:
					message='Date range cannot be greater than a Month'
					setMessage("Error",message)
					system.perspective.print("message %s"%message)
				else:
					startDate=SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").format(startDate)
					endDate=SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").format(endDate)
					self.parent.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").position.height=460
					self.parent.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").meta.visible=True
					self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").position.height=0
					self.props.enabled=False
					cols = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Report/StationStatusReport/getDistinctWorkstations',{'areaName':areaName,'lineName':lineName})
					system.perspective.print("cols %s"%cols)
					system.perspective.print("cols for Row count %s"%cols.getRowCount())
					system.perspective.print("cols for Column count %s"%cols.getColumnCount())
					system.perspective.print("namedQuery %s"%namedQuery)
					colIndex = 4
				  # Loop through each row in the PyDataSet
					for i in range(4,31):
						self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.columns[i].visible=False
					#system.perspective.print("i %s"%i)
					for row in range(cols.getRowCount()):
						for col in range(cols.getColumnCount()):
							self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.columns[colIndex].field = cols.getValueAt(row, col)
							system.perspective.print("self.props.columns[colIndex].field %s"%self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.columns[colIndex].field)
							self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.columns[colIndex].visible=True
							colIndex=colIndex + 1
							system.perspective.print("colIndex %s"%colIndex)
					if lineName in ('LD DIFF CARRIER SUB ASSY LINE A','HD DIFF CARRIER SUB ASSY LINE A','LD DIFF CARRIER SUB ASSY LINE B','LD SUB ASSY CWP Marriage','HD DIFF CARRIER SUB ASSY LINE B','HD SUB ASSY CWP MARRIAGE'):
						Result = system.db.runNamedQuery(namedQuery2,{'AreaName':areaName,'LineName':lineName,'FromDate':startDate, 'ToDate':endDate})
						system.perspective.print("namedQuery2 %s"%namedQuery2)
						self.parent.parent.getChild("msgStrip").props.text=Result
					else:
					 	system.perspective.print("namedQuery %s"%namedQuery)
						Result = system.db.runNamedQuery(namedQuery,{'AreaName':areaName,'LineName':lineName,'FromDate':startDate, 'ToDate':endDate})
						self.parent.parent.getChild("msgStrip").props.text=Result
					system.perspective.print("Result %s"%Result)
					
					if Result:
						self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.data=Result
						message='Data retrieved successfully'
						
						#self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.cells.style
						setMessage("Success",message)
						self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").position.height=460
						self.parent.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").position.height=0
						#self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").meta.visible=True
						self.parent.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").meta.visible=False
						self.props.enabled=True
					else:
						message='No data found in this date range'
						setMessage("Success",message)
						self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").position.height=460
						self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").position.height=0
						self.parent.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").meta.visible=False
						self.props.enabled=True
	except Exception as e:
			system.perspective.print(str(e))
			screenName ='StationReport'    
			errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> WorkInstruction')  
			errorType=str('Application')   
			description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno)
			system.perspective.print("lineNumber %s"%lineNumber)
			system.perspective.print("description %s"%description)
	def setMessage(status,message):
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType="setMessage",payload={ "message": message,"status": status},scope="view" )

import system
	tableData = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.data
	if tableData:
#		# Extract headers dynamically from table columns
#		if len(tableData) > 0:
#		    headers = list(tableData.getColumnNames())
#		else:
#		    headers = []
#		# Prepare rows of data from the table
#		rows = []
#		for row in tableData:
#		    rows.append([row[col] for col in headers])
#		dataset = system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, rows) 
		csvData = system.dataset.toCSV(tableData, showHeaders=True)
		filePath = system.file.getTempFile("SFCStatusReport.csv")
		system.file.writeFile(filePath, csvData)
		fileName = "SFCStatusReport.csv"
		csvBytes = system.file.readFileAsBytes(filePath)
		system.perspective.download(fileName, csvBytes)
		message='File downloaded Successfully'
		setMessage("Success",message)	
	else:
		message='Please first Retrieve data and then Download excel'
		setMessage("Error",message)	


def setMessage(status,message):
	system.perspective.sendMessage(
	    messageType="setMessage",
   		payload={
        	"message": message,
        	"status": status
    	},
    	scope="view"  
	)

messageHandlers.script:
# Get the parameters from the message
	message = payload['message']  
	status = payload['status']
	
	# Update the Text Field's text
	self.props.text = message
	self.meta.visible=True
	# Apply the style class (from the payload or a default value)
	self.props.style.classes = "successMsg" if status=='Success' else "errMsg"

# implement your handler here
	source = payload['source']
	action = payload['action']
	rowData = payload['rowData']
	rowIndex = payload['rowIndex']
	column = payload['column']
	if source==self.custom.tableId:
		if action=='update':
			newValue = payload['newValue']
			SerialNumber=rowData['SerialNumber']
			self.refreshBinding("props.data")
